task_completion.description: Open the Odoo Calendar module in the browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window showing Odoo at localhost:8069 with the Calendar module active.

task_completion.description: Select calendar events in the list view
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo list view of calendar events with checkboxes selected, indicating events are chosen for export.

task_completion.description: Configure export to include Subject, Start Date, and End Date
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo export dialog box showing 'Subject' (or 'Name'), 'Start Date', and 'End Date' (or 'Stop') in the 'Fields to export' list.

task_completion.description: Set the export format to CSV
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo export dialog box showing 'CSV' selected as the export format.

task_completion.description: Save the exported file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal, or browser download dialog showing the file saved as 'calendar_export.csv' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web UI (list view, export dialog) rather than terminal commands querying the database directly.

integrity.description: The exported file was generated by Odoo's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo export dialog is visible and used, rather than a text editor or spreadsheet application being used to manually type out the events.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually create the CSV file using echo or a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing 'echo' commands or text editors (like nano/vim) creating the 'calendar_export.csv' file with hardcoded data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export path is /home/ga/Documents/calendar_export.csv. The exported CSV must contain column headers matching variants of subject/name, start, and stop/end. The Odoo database contains 21 synthetic calendar events, so the export should reflect multiple rows of data.
